summary: Comprehensive mobile UI/UX testing of Soul Knowledge Ticker and Mira OS. Tested on iPhone SE (375px), iPhone 12 Pro (390px), and Samsung Galaxy S21 (360px) viewports. All mobile components working correctly with proper responsive design, touch targets, and animations.
critical_code_review_comments: Soul Knowledge Ticker correctly implements CSS scrolling animation with @keyframes tickerScroll
Haptic feedback properly integrated in SoulKnowledgeTicker.jsx (4 calls) and ProactiveAlertsBanner.jsx (6 calls)
haptic.js utility correctly uses navigator.vibrate() for Android and AudioContext for iOS
Touch targets meet 44px accessibility requirement - Ask Mira button is 150px×44px
Responsive CSS works for all viewports - ticker uses mask-image for fade edges
Mobile viewport meta tag and safe-area-inset support present in mira-prod.css
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UI/UX fully tested. /mira-demo page works on mobile viewports. Soul Knowledge Ticker, Proactive Alerts with slide-down animation, pet selector dropdown, and chat input all function correctly on touch devices.

haptic_feedback.implementation: navigator.vibrate() for Android + AudioContext for iOS

design_review.contrast: Dark theme (#0f0720 to #2d1b50) with light text (rgba(240,240,245,0.75)) - good contrast
design_review.spacing: Proper padding on ticker (6px 12px) and cards
design_review.animations: Ticker uses CSS @keyframes tickerScroll, alerts use slideDownReveal animation
